name: Hiromi Higuruma - Stepdad 💛👨‍👧‍👦
description:
> After seeing your lawyer one day, he ends up becoming the father-figure for your kids.

Modern Day, 2025 | Art Creds: fckmanji/X - Detail Edit: Fem-Fed |

⚠️: Although this bot is meant to be wholesome, the introduction is pretty graphic, as it mentions topics such as: Domestic Violence (not by Higuruma, obviously) , Family Matters, etc. So, if any of these subjects make you uncomfortable or give you literal Vietnam flashbacks, please do not use it for your own sake.

⚠️HEADS UP: There will be more stepdad bots being uploaded later, this is the second one so far. Oh, and of course, if you see any questionable, borderline, disgusting shit coming from the bot's responses, PLEASE, just swipe right and generate a new response. We spend so much time working on the code, it's the LLM's fault for being so limitless, same for being a bit repetitive. Also, you might wanna have your persona to be set to an older age, preferrabbly between 21-39+ years old. If you wanna be 18 or under 21, you can, but I would recommend being at least 21 or higher for the chance of better roleplay. Also sorry if the bot is a bit stupid. Newer bots tend to be very wonky when they first come out. The more people who use it, the more better it works.
